description_long: This object consists of three lotion containers of varying sizes, each with a distinct shape and closure. The largest container features a pump dispenser with a rounded, ergonomic body and a slightly translucent appearance, likely made of plastic. The two smaller containers have rounded, screw-on or snap-on caps and a more cylindrical, slightly twisted form, suggesting they are designed for portability. The surfaces of all containers are smooth with subtle curves, and the material appears semi-glossy, reflecting light softly. Minimalistic graphics and faint embossed markings are visible on the largest bottle, while the smaller bottles are mostly plain. The overall color scheme is a combination of white and light gray, giving a clean and hygienic look suitable for personal care products.
description: A set of three lotion containers in white and light gray, featuring a pump dispenser and two capped bottles with smooth, curved surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pump dispenser bottle and two capped bottles side by side, highlighting their different sizes and closure types.
description_view_1: Angled view emphasizing the pump mechanism on the largest bottle and the cylindrical shape of the capped bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the capped bottles and the side profile of the pump dispenser.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the curvature of the pump bottle and the alignment of the capped bottle behind it.
